case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. SAMUEL BROWNE et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED BY WRITTEN STIPULATION. REPORTING OF TERMS WAIVED BY PARTIES. SEE SCANNED STIPULATIONS IN CASES 611402, 611221, 611284 FOR TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT BY STIPULATION IN CASE 610509 THE PARTIES AGREED NOT TO FILE THE WRITTEN STIPULATION UNTIL SUCH TIME AS THE TERMS THEREIN WERE BREACHED. ORAL TERMS OF THE STIPULATION IN CASE 610509 WERE PLACED ON THE COURT RECORD WITH JUDGE PRO TEM SUSAN LEW; D. CARTER, CLERK; MITCH LYONS, CSR. 6840.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWNE, SAMUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 44 MCALLISTER STREET, #429 SF $2,671.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,671.00, SEE SCANNED UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT
